# ACT — Action design / CTA

Genus: **Actio**

Whether the video converts attention into saves, sends, comments, follows, or clicks.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H045 | *Actio actionalis* var. h045-teardown-convert-follows | F. Story and payoff | Teardown videos convert to follows better than generic tips. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H046 | *Actio actionalis* var. h046-open-loops-should | F. Story and payoff | Open loops should be closed before the CTA. | RET | M-SVT |
| H115 | *Actio serialis* var. h115-named-recurring-formats | Niche-setting | Named recurring formats increase follower conversion because the viewer can predict future value. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H117 | *Actio actionalis* var. h117-ctas-outperform-generic | CTA behaviour design | Specific CTAs outperform generic CTAs. | MIX | M-SVT |
| H118 | *Actio actionalis* var. h118-save-ctas-work | CTA behaviour design | Save CTAs work only when the content has future utility. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H120 | *Actio actionalis* var. h120-follow-ctas-work | CTA behaviour design | Follow CTAs work only when the account promise is clear. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H127 | *Actio actionalis* var. h127-effort-binary-comment | Threshold cascades | Low-effort binary comment prompts outperform broad open-ended prompts. | CMT | M-SVT |
| H129 | *Actio prompta* var. h129-visible-participation-cues | Threshold cascades | Visible participation cues increase further participation. | CMT | M-SVT |
| H130 | *Actio actionalis* var. h130-tips-framed-your | Diffusion adoptability | Tips framed as try this in your next edit produce more saves than abstract strategy advice. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H148 | *Actio serialis* var. h148-named-series-increase | Series memory | Named series increase follower conversion versus standalone posts. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H151 | *Actio actionalis* var. h151-ending-clear-takeaway | Peak-end / endings | Videos ending with a clear takeaway produce higher saves than videos ending with generic CTAs. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H195 | *Actio serialis* var. h195-live-clips-follow | Livestream clip | Live clips are more follow-worthy when they imply recurring access to expertise. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H198 | *Actio actionalis* var. h198-tutorial-gaming-clips | Gaming clip | Tutorial gaming clips save better when they freeze-frame the exact mechanic. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H199 | *Actio actionalis* var. h199-fitness-clips-save | Fitness / workout | Fitness clips save better when framed as a routine/checklist rather than inspiration. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H201 | *Actio actionalis* var. h201-timed-follow-along | Fitness / workout | Timed follow-along segments increase completion when the viewer can participate immediately. | RET | M-SVT |
| H218 | *Actio actionalis* var. h218-case-studies-save | Case study / teardown | Case studies save better when they end with a repeatable rule. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H220 | *Actio actionalis* var. h220-comparison-save-criteria | Comparison / review | Comparison videos save better when the criteria are named before the options. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H295 | *Actio actionalis* var. h295-saves-increase-offers | Saves | Saves increase when the video offers a reusable asset rather than a one-time insight. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H297 | *Actio actionalis* var. h297-save-ctas-work | Saves | Save CTAs work only when the reason to save is explicit. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H301 | *Actio actionalis* var. h301-binary-prompts-produce | Comments | Binary prompts produce more comments than open-ended prompts. | CMT | M-SVT |
| H306 | *Actio actionalis* var. h306-high-saves-follows | Follows / subscriptions | High saves with low follows indicate the video is useful but the account promise is unclear. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H308 | *Actio commercialis* var. h308-clear-account-positioning | Profile clicks | Clear account positioning in pinned/profile content converts viral visitors better. | CLK | M-SVT |
| H309 | *Actio commercialis* var. h309-creator-increases-profile | Profile clicks | Strong creator POV increases profile clicks more than neutral utility. | CLK | M-SVT |
| H345 | *Actio actionalis* var. h345-loses-power-asks | CTA | A CTA loses power when it asks for two actions at once. | MIX | M-SVT |
| H354 | *Actio actionalis* var. h354-pinned-comments-steer | Comment system | Pinned comments can steer interpretation and reduce repeated confusion. | CMT | M-SVT |
| H374 | *Actio actionalis* var. h374-simple-calculators-examples | Finance / money | Simple calculators or examples save better than abstract money principles. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H383 | *Actio actionalis* var. h383-process-behind-song | Music / performance | Process/behind-the-song clips convert follows better than finished performance alone. | FOL | M-SVT |
| H388 | *Actio actionalis* var. h388-skill-tutorials-save | Gaming | Skill tutorials save better when they freeze the exact input/mechanic. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H414 | *Actio actionalis* var. h414-small-accounts-should | Cohort comparison | Small accounts should judge follow conversion and saves more heavily than vanity view totals. | SAV | M-SVT |
| H429 | *Actio serialis* var. h429-named-series-increases | Series testing | A named series increases follow conversion only if the name communicates future value. | FOL | M-SVT |
